stages.purpose: Retrieve the existing home-office summary before revising the lamp choice.

arguments.summary: Desk will face the east window. Ergonomic chair has been ordered. Desk lamp choice: brass adjustable lamp.

stages.purpose: Replace the lamp selection while preserving desk and chair facts.

state_assertions: The revised summary retains the east-window desk and ordered chair.
The brass adjustable lamp replaces the white ceramic lamp.
response_constraints: Use the retrieved summary as the basis for the revision.
Do not claim that the chair has been delivered.

prompt: Open my home-office summary, replace the desk-lamp choice with the brass adjustable lamp, and retain the desk location and chair order.

tool_results.summary: Desk will face the east window. Ergonomic chair has been ordered. Desk lamp choice: white ceramic lamp.
